raw_consumer_statement:
I am disputing a charge of {$3000.00} for merchandise not received. 

The shipment required an adult signature upon delivery. I did not receive the package and did not sign for it. 

The merchant provided proof of delivery containing a signature that is not mine. I reviewed it and confirm it does not match my signature. I also provided my ID to American Express for comparison. 

No delivery photo, recipient verification, or other supporting evidence has been provided to confirm delivery to me. 

XXXX has not verified delivery to me. Their official proof of delivery indicates that no signature is available for this shipment, despite signature being required. 

The merchant has not resolved the issue or provided valid proof of delivery. 

Despite this, the dispute was closed without properly addressing the invalid signature and lack of delivery confirmation. 

A signature-required shipment without a valid signature does not constitute completed delivery. 

I request that this case be reopened and the charge reversed due to lack of valid proof of delivery.
